spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (Control Room & Tetris Hybrid for Pitch Deck)

buttons.primary: bg-[#6EEAB1] text-black font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#5CE0A1] transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(110,234,177,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(110,234,177,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#27272A] text-white font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:border-[#6EEAB1] hover:text-[#6EEAB1] transition-all

cards.style: bg-[#121212] border border-[#27272A] rounded-2xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden

motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: framer-motion initial={{opacity:0, y:20}} whileInView={{opacity:1, y:0}} viewport={{once:true}}
motion_and_interactions.stagger_children: framer-motion variants for lists and grid items
motion_and_interactions.hover_glow: Add blur-md behind primary elements for a kinetic trigger effect

sections.name: Header
sections.content: Logo + Nav (Le Problème, La Solution, Marché, Équipe) + CTA 'Contact Investisseur'
sections.design_rules: Sticky glassmorphism header, z-50. Nav links white hover to mint green.

sections.name: Hero
sections.content: Tagline: 'L\'IA qui redéfinit la performance humaine.' Dual CTA: 'Voir la Démo' (Primary), 'Pitch Deck' (Secondary)
sections.design_rules: Deep black background with subtle abstract texture (hero_background) and mint green glowing orb overlay in background. H1 left aligned or centered, max width.

sections.name: Problem
sections.content: Why current nutrition tracking fails: manual entry is dead. Athletes guess their data.
sections.design_rules: High contrast typography. Large stats. Use 'Tracing Beam' effect on cards.

sections.name: Solution
sections.content: NutriSnap: Snap a meal, AI analyzes macros, adjusts sleep schedule and training load instantly.
sections.design_rules: Product-led. Dark UI mockups or bento grid showing 'Photo -> Data -> Insights'.

sections.name: Market (TAM/SAM/SOM)
sections.design_rules: Data visualization style. Concentric circles or overlapping glowing rectangles using #6EEAB1.

sections.name: Product Features
sections.content: Bento Grid: Photo Scan, AI Coach, Sleep tracking, Performance integration.
sections.design_rules: Control Room Grid. Dense, tech-forward. 1px borders with hover glows.

sections.name: Traction
sections.content: Placeholder KPIs: Beta users, retention rate, accuracy.
sections.design_rules: Dashboard-style cards. Big numbers (text-5xl) in Cabinet Grotesk, Mint Green color.

sections.name: Business Model
sections.design_rules: Clean table or metric blocks. Grid borders.

sections.name: Team
sections.design_rules: Professional headshots in grayscale with mint green hover accent.

sections.name: Roadmap
sections.design_rules: Vertical timeline with mint green glowing dots as nodes.

sections.name: Investor Contact Form
sections.content: Functional form to request full pitch deck or meeting.
sections.design_rules: Shadcn form. Dark inputs, mint green focus rings.

sections.name: Footer
sections.design_rules: Massive space py-24. Dark grey text.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-investor')
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on #0A0A0A passes APCA. Mint green #6EEAB1 used for accents/buttons with dark text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use HTML+Tailwind for layouts, Shadcn for interactive UI (Forms). Do NOT use generic purple/blue gradients. Strictly use #0A0A0A background and #6EEAB1 for all glowing accents. Keep the aesthetic 'Investor Pitch'—clean, scannable, and premium. Implement all sections in French as requested.
